scripts.migrate:up: pnpm run env:setup && node scripts/check-migration-policy.mjs && node --env-file=postgres/.env --env-file-if-exists=postgres/.env.local scripts/migrate.mjs up
scripts.migrate:down: pnpm run env:setup && node scripts/check-migration-policy.mjs && node --env-file=postgres/.env --env-file-if-exists=postgres/.env.local scripts/migrate.mjs down
scripts.postgres:up: pnpm run env:setup && node scripts/postgres-compose.mjs up -d --wait postgres && node scripts/check-migration-policy.mjs && node --env-file=postgres/.env --env-file-if-exists=postgres/.env.local scripts/migrate.mjs up && node --env-file=postgres/.env --env-file-if-exists=postgres/.env.local scripts/seed-postgres.mjs
scripts.postgres:down: pnpm run env:setup && node scripts/postgres-compose.mjs down
scripts.postgres:reset: pnpm run env:setup && node scripts/postgres-compose.mjs down --volumes && node scripts/postgres-compose.mjs up -d --wait postgres && node scripts/check-migration-policy.mjs && node --env-file=postgres/.env --env-file-if-exists=postgres/.env.local scripts/migrate.mjs up && node --env-file=postgres/.env --env-file-if-exists=postgres/.env.local scripts/seed-postgres.mjs
scripts.postgres:logs: pnpm run env:setup && node scripts/postgres-compose.mjs logs -f postgres
